== Notes for [[Item:Q100532|Q100532]] ==

[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sheshet_Benveniste Sheshet ben Isaac ben Joseph Benveniste] (lived in the latter half of the twelfth century) was a French Jewish physician and writer. Like Isaac Benveniste, who is supposed to have been his father, he was styled "Nasi" (prince). [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sheshet_Benveniste ''biography continued]

----
Jews, Christian Society, & Royal Power in Medieval Barcelona. By Elka Klein. Page 81. < [https://books.google.com/books?id=f9h_e-3JOYAC&lpg=PA87&ots=IHFPDaPbr0&dq=Tolsana%20Gracian&pg=PA81#v=onepage&q=Sheshet%20ben%20Isaac%20ben%20Joseph%20Benveniste%20&f=false GoogleBooks] >

>Sheshet had three sons, all of whom pre deceased him. … In the absence of sons, Sheshet’s heirs were his two daughters, Mira and Tolsana. Mira married her cousin Isaac, the son of Sheshet’s brother Benvenist; ….
----

===Family

https://www.davidicdynasty.org/shaltiel-early-descendants-of-bustanai/

*18 Isaac Benvenist Saltell b. ABT 1085 Barcelona d. BEF 1136 Barcelona m. Reina d. AFT 1136
**19 Sheshet Perfet(Abraham) Benvenist b. 1131 d. 1204 Barcelona m. Boneta Perfet
*** 20 Samuel Benvenist b. _____ d. BEF 1204
*** 20 /Benvenist/ b. _____ d. BEF 1200
*** 20 /Benvenist/ b. _____ d. BEF 1204
*** 20 Mira Benvenist b. ABT 1158 m. Benvenist Isaac b. ABT 1155 Barcelona
*** 20 Tolsana Benvenist b. ABT 1160 Barcelona d. BEF 1226 m. Makir Perfet Bailiff b. ABT 1170


===References
* Singer, Isidore; et al., eds. (1901–1906). The Jewish Encyclopedia. New York: Funk & Wagnalls < [https://www.jewishencyclopedia.com/articles/3011-benveniste link] >
*Jews, Christian Society, & Royal Power in Medieval Barcelona By Elka Klein. Page 212 < [https://books.google.com/books?id=f9h_e-3JOYAC&lpg=PR4&pg=PA212#v=onepage&q&f=false GoogleBooks] >

*Sheshet Benveniste | Galeria de Metges Catalans < [https://www.galeriametges.cat/galeria-fitxa.php?icod=EFDF link] >

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8AA1B01EFBBFA9822EF79916CE74E
geni:6000000015844650057

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
